Name: Percentage of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' occurring immediately after 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'
Metric: Percentage of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' out of all 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Percentage of process variants containing 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' relative to the total number of variants
Metric: Percentage of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' out of all cases

Name: Number of cases where 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' appears, compared to the number of cases where 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' appears

Name: Percentage of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' that are followed by a resubmission ('Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE') within the same case

Name: Frequency of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' in variants that do not include any approval by BUDGET OWNER or PRE_APPROVER

Name: Percentage of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' occurring in domestic travel reimbursement claims (inferred from absence of pre-approval steps)
Metric: Percentage of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' out of all cases where 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' does not happen

Name: Ratio of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' to 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' out of all 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Number of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' events associated with amounts below 100 euros
Metric: Number of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' activities < 100 where ma is the last value of case:Amount

Name: Percentage of cases ending with 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' without any subsequent activity
Metric: Percentage of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' that occur in variants also containing 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'
Metric: Percentage of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' out of all 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Number of times 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' interrupts a direct path from 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' to 'Request Payment'

Name: Percentage of all rejected declarations (any 'Declaration REJECTED by ...') that are specifically 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'
Metric: Percentage of 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' out of all cases
